sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I keep making the syntax error. Let me count the parentheses carefully:
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}]
- action( - opens paren 1
- [ - opens bracket 1
- {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}
- ] - closes bracket 1
- ) - closes paren 1
So: action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}])

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I keep making the syntax error. Let me count the parentheses carefully:
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}]
- action( - opens paren 1
- [ - opens bracket 1
- {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}
- ] - closes bracket 1
- ) - closes paren 1
So: action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 16}])
